title: The Shy Hero and the Three Princesses
overview: Toto is a hero, but very shy, and three assassins have him in their sights.

title: The Shy Hero and the First Adventure
overview: Toto, Ciel, Anemone, and Goa officially form a party and take on their first quest.

title: The Shy Hero and the Lovers' Rendezvous
overview: Goa and Anemone each make attempts on Toto's life, while Ciel seeks out high quality sweets.

title: The Shy Hero and The Promotion Quest
overview: Toto and the assassins have earned the right to test for their next adventurer rank by clearing a dungeon.

title: The Shy Hero and Independence
overview: Ciel is faced with an ultimatum: kill Toto or be taken back to the Demon Lord's castle for more training.

title: The Shy Hero and the Costumed Princesses
overview: Toto and his party make their first long distance journey on their quest.

title: The Shy Hero and the Town of Mad Love
overview: Toto and his party arrive in a town where love is in the air, to a disturbing degree.

title: The Shy Hero and the Witch of Hypnosis
overview: Anemone has fallen under hypnosis and wastes no time in attacking Ciel and Goa.

title: The Shy Hero and Wrestling on the Water
overview: Toto's party arrives at a seaside town where they enter a local competition.

title: The Shy Hero and The Demons
overview: The truth about Fresnir and Coshta leaves Toto new perspective to consider.

title: The Shy Hero and the Master of Dreams
overview: Toto, Ciel, and Anemone have everything they ever wanted. It seems to good to be true...

title: The Shy Hero and the Assassin Princesses
overview: Trapped in Goa's illusion, Ciel, Anemone, and Toto have to rely on her true feelings to escape.
